entries.definition:
Qur’an.
كَهْل kahl [quasi-act. part.] of full age, in maturity, in manhood
(3:46) وَيُكَلِّمُ النَّاسَ فِي الْمَهْدِ وَكَهْلًا and he will address people in [his]
cradle/childhood and in his adulthood.
entries.definition_english:
Qur’an.
كَهْل kahl [quasi-act. part.] of full age, in maturity, in manhood
(3:46) وَيُكَلِّمُ النَّاسَ فِي الْمَهْدِ وَكَهْلًا and he will address people in [his]
cradle/childhood and in his adulthood.
